Federal Blog Our Team Book Schedule a Visit Client Login

"Will your money last as long as you do?"

Our job is to make sure the answer is yes

Your Retirement, Planned.

Most financial advisors stop at portfolio management. We start there. Capital Wealth builds comprehensive retirement plans that coordinate your income, taxes, healthcare, estate, and investments into a single strategy.

We specialize in the transition from saving to spending — the most complex financial shift most families will ever face. With 25+ years of experience and over 650 clients served, our approach is built on real outcomes, not theoretical models.

Every plan we build starts with the same question: Will your money last as long as you do? Our job is to make sure the answer is yes.

Retirement Money Map

Visual roadmap showing exactly how your money will work throughout retirement

Tax-Efficient Withdrawal Strategies

Coordinate your income sources to minimize lifetime tax burden
WHAT WE DO

Core Services

Specialized Services

We specialize in retirement income planning and tax optimization for families with $500K+ in retirement savings.

View All Services

Portfolio Management

Professional investment management coordinated with your retirement income strategy for optimal outcomes.

Learn More →

Social Security Optimization

Maximize your lifetime Social Security benefits with strategic claiming timing and coordination with other income sources.

Optimize Benefits →
650+ Clients
25+ Years
100% Fiduciary
Full Service
HOW IT WORKS

Our Planning Process

  • 01

    Discovery & Analysis

    We gather all your financial information and analyze your current situation, goals, and risk tolerance. This includes reviewing your accounts, income sources, tax situation, insurance, and estate documents to build a complete picture.

  • 02

    Strategy Development

    We create a personalized retirement plan with tax-efficient withdrawal strategies, income optimization, Social Security timing, and healthcare cost projections — all coordinated into a single, actionable strategy.

  • 03

    Implementation

    We execute your plan with proper account structures, investment allocations, beneficiary designations, and legal documentation. Every piece is coordinated so nothing falls through the cracks.

$500K+
Minimum
WHO WE SERVE

Built for Families Approaching — or Already In — Retirement

1

Retired or Close To It

You're approaching retirement or already retired and need strategic income planning to make your savings last.

Learn More →
2

Diligent Savers ($500K+)

You've built substantial savings and need professional guidance to optimize your retirement strategy.

Learn More →
3

Tax-Conscious Planners

You understand the impact of taxes on retirement and want strategies to minimize your tax burden.

Learn More →
SPECIALIZED PLANNING

Specialized Services

FERS Planning TSP Optimization FEGLI Analysis

Federal Employee Benefits

Specialized strategies for federal employees including FERS optimization, TSP management, FEGLI analysis, and coordination with other federal benefits. We're one of the few firms that specialize in federal retirement.

Federal Benefits Planning →

Retirement Money Map

Our signature planning tool that creates a visual roadmap of your financial future, showing exactly how your money will work throughout retirement. A clear plan for every dollar — income, expenses, taxes, and healthcare, all coordinated.

Capital Wealth Planning Process
GET STARTED

Three Steps to a Better Retirement

1

Schedule

Call 801.210.2800 or use our online form to schedule your complimentary initial assessment.

2

Meet

We'll discuss your goals, review your current situation, and explore how we can help optimize your retirement plan.

3

Plan

If we're a good fit, we'll create your personalized retirement strategy using our comprehensive planning process.
